posts.author: DarrenHens (Darren Henson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello
First time poster alert!!
I have been using this for a while in my company, i was just wondering, when i add a new table form the tab up the top it only duplicates what is on the original table.
if i add/delete groups from one then it deletes it from the other aswell?

Can anyone shed some light on this for me?

posts.author: adan9scfc (Adam Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get an answer to this?
